description.value:
Type: Ninjutsu (Doton)

Rank: 6 (Spell Level 3)

Chakra Cost: 6

Learn DC: 19 | Successes: 2

Perform: 7 | Perform DC: 19

Components: H

You focus Chakra into a mud river you've created with Doryuu Taiga no Jutsu and whose starting point is within range. A dragon-shaped head emerges from the mud and starts shooting mud balls at creatures caught inside the mud river. Each round, the dragon fires one mud ball per 3 levels, divided as you choose among creatures caught in the mud river (a creature can be targeted more than once). Each mud ball deals 1d6 earth damage, avoided with a Reflex save.

If you use a Fire technique which affects the dragon head, its projectiles will deal an additional 1d4 Fire damage for 1d4+1 rounds as it burns.

Ends once its duration expires, or if the Doryuu Taiga no Jutsu hosting it expires.
